2026-05-31T09:19:07.5973018Z ##[group]Run # Create a temporary file
2026-05-31T09:19:07.5973460Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.5973753Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.5974017Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.5974283Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.5974883Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.5975237Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.5975468Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.7346452Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8712798Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8713189Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8713653Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8713950Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8714274Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8714845Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8715210Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8715631Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8716037Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8716403Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8716686Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8716931Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8717464Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8717935Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8718175Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8718534Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8719119Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8719599Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8719804Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8720380Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8720964Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8721172Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T09:19:07.8721523Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
